summary: Completed testing of 5 new PMS features. All backend APIs (17/17 tests) pass. Frontend UI for all 10 tabs in ReservationDetailModal verified. New pages (Group Bookings, Deposit Tracking) accessible via navigation.

minor.issue: Date-filtered query returns gzip-compressed response that some clients may not decode correctly. No-filter endpoint works fine.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 10 modal tabs working, new pages loading correctly)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed group bookings and deposits during API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: 5 new features tested successfully: 1) Room Change UI (Oda Degistir tab with dropdown and reason selection), 2) Group Booking Management page (/group-bookings-manage with Toplu Giris/Cikis buttons), 3) Communication History (Iletisim tab with Kayit Ekle button), 4) Deposit Tracking (modal tab + /deposit-tracking page with summary cards), 5) ReservationCalendar.js refactored. Modal has 10 tabs total. Navigation includes 'Grup Rezervasyonlari' and 'Depozito Takibi' links.

frontend_ui: ReservationDetailModal opens on double-click booking bar
10 tabs visible: Genel Bilgiler, Misafirler, Folyolar, Gunluk Fiyatlar, Ek Ucretler, Oda Degistir, Depozito, Iletisim, Notlar, Gecmis
Oda Degistir tab: shows current room, dropdown for new room, reason selection, Oda Degistir button
Depozito tab: Depozito Al button, summary cards visible
Iletisim tab: Iletisim Gecmisi header, Kayit Ekle button
Folyolar tab: Odeme Al, Cariye Aktar, Acente Odemesi buttons all visible
Group Bookings page: Yeni Grup button, groups list with Toplu Giris/Cikis
Deposit Tracking page: Summary cards (Toplam, Aktif, Iade Edilen) with colored backgrounds
Navigation: Grup Rezervasyonlari and Depozito Takibi links in top nav
